title: End Villager Outpost
description: Adds a large Villager moon outpost to the End
body:
### End Villager Outpost

**This mod adds a large Villager moon outpost to the End.**
![Outpost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70075ada75b432aa56abe1e768109166f19f722d.jpeg)



- Villagers of different professions live and trade inside this floating moon base.
- The interior is nicely decorated, and you’ll also find some End themed loot throughout the outpost.
  
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2a1e32c19d808aa2e518df14122fb772a03bb4d.jpeg)

- There are even hidden loot secrets waiting to be discovered inside.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/080396d01c3fc1c16edde6ce64a44c2edf0ef815.jpeg)
  

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
